description: Gold-set of 50 public-legal research prompts that contain ZERO client-identifying facts. Measures analyzer preservation precision: the analyzer MUST NOT flag any span in these prompts as client-confidential. Tokens on any of these would be false positives that hurt attorney UX.

prompts.text: Summarize the elements of undue influence under California Welfare and Institutions Code § 15610.70.
What are the disclosure requirements for supplemental responses to interrogatories under CCP § 2030.300?
Explain Probate Code § 859 double damages in the context of trustee self-dealing.
What are the California pleading standards for intentional interference with contractual relations?
How does California Family Code § 1615 govern enforceability of premarital agreements?
Outline the fiduciary duty rules for LLC managers under California Corporations Code § 17704.09.
What protections does California's Unruh Civil Rights Act provide against discrimination?
Summarize California's rules on forum-selection clauses in consumer contracts.
What are the statutes of limitations for legal malpractice claims under CCP § 340.6?
Explain the California anti-SLAPP procedure under CCP § 425.16.
When is attorney-client privilege waived under California Evidence Code § 912?
Outline California's requirements for electronic wills under Probate Code § 6110.5.
What are the duties of a successor trustee under California Probate Code § 16060 et seq.?
How does California Civil Code § 1670.11 limit waivers in settlement agreements concerning sexual harassment?
Summarize the California law on piercing the corporate veil.
What are the valid grounds for dissolution of a marriage under California Family Code § 2310?
Explain the burden-shifting framework in wrongful termination cases under FEHA.
How does California treat intellectual property as community property in a divorce?
What constitutes adequate disclosure under California Business and Professions Code § 17200?
When may a petitioner serve discovery before the case management conference?
Explain the statutory damages available under California Consumer Privacy Act.
What factors do California courts consider in awarding spousal support?
How does Proposition 65 affect product warning requirements?
Outline the California rules for depositions under CCP § 2025.210.
What are the elements of a fraudulent transfer claim under California Civil Code § 3439?
How does California Code of Civil Procedure § 664.6 enforce settlement agreements?
What duties does a personal representative owe under California probate law?
Explain the standard for granting summary adjudication under CCP § 437c.
When is a California trust considered revocable under Probate Code § 15800?
What are the disclosure obligations for purchase and sale contracts for residential real estate in California?
Summarize the elements of a breach of fiduciary duty claim under California law.
Outline how California treats non-compete clauses under Business and Professions Code § 16600.
How does California handle successor liability after an asset purchase transaction?
What are the procedural requirements for an ex parte application in California Superior Court?
Explain the standard for attorney disqualification based on prior representation.
When must a party move to compel further responses to interrogatories?
What is the proper remedy when a deposition is improperly noticed?
How does California Corporations Code § 309 allocate liability among directors?
What standard of care applies to successor trustees under California Probate Code?
Explain the elements of a tortious interference with expected inheritance claim in California.
What are the requirements for a valid holographic will under California Probate Code § 6111?
Outline the California rule on apportionment of fault under Proposition 51.
When does Code of Civil Procedure § 2030.300 require a further response to interrogatories?
Explain the California three-strikes law under Penal Code § 667.
What are the pleading requirements for punitive damages under Civil Code § 3294?
How does California Labor Code § 2802 govern employee indemnification?
What are the rules for closing argument in California civil trials?
Summarize California's Right of Publicity under Civil Code § 3344.
Explain the elements of a California franchise tax apportionment challenge.
What are the procedural requirements for a class certification motion under CCP § 382?
